# What the site above almost certainly meant.
# Training crawlers are blocked. Search and retrieval crawlers are allowed,
# so the site stays citable in ChatGPT and Perplexity.

User-agent: GPTBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: ClaudeBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: CCBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: Google-Extended
Disallow: /

User-agent: *
Allow: /

Sitemap: https://example.com/sitemap.xml
